race.comment: ARCORA (1) dominant staying colt who's third in line for Australian Derby favouritism. Game second in the G2 Autumn Classic, then led throughout from the wide gate to score a comprehensive win over this trip in the Australian Cup Prelude at Flemington. Can tag SHANGRI LA BOY and assert his class late. SHANGRI LA BOY (2) finished a narrow second in the G1 Spring Champion in the Spring and has needed both runs back over the shorter trips. Winning rider goes back aboard and look for a much-improved showing. O'SHEAMUS (3) placed in the G2 Vase in the Spring and yet to fill a placing in two runs since resuming. Held in high regard by the yard and the booking of Zac Lloyd is a good lead. VARJAK (7) underrated Contributer gelding fitter after two runs back. Gritty effort with the 60kg when third over 1600m at Gosford. Can surprise in this grade, and worth noting J Mac has been booked. BRAVE DANZA (4) comes up from Victoria with a solid staying record. Caught the eye on return and keep safe.
